stemHtml: What is the difference between an RNAV SID and an RNAV overlay SID?

options.a: The RNAV overlay SID will take less time due to less constraints.
options.b: The RNAV overlay SID will take more time due to less constraints.
options.c: The RNAV overlay SID is a longer route than the RNAV SID.
options.d: The RNAV overlay SID will follow the same track as the conventional procedure.
